entities.name: PIGEONPEA
entities.description: An important pulse crop grown in peninsular India.

entities.name: PENINSULAR INDIA
entities.description: A region in India where pigeonpea is extensively grown.

entities.name: HYBRID TECHNOLOGY
entities.description: A technology based on CMS and natural cross-pollination to increase crop productivity.

entities.name: CYTOPLASMIC NUCLEAR MALE-STERILITY
entities.description: A biological mechanism used as a basis for hybrid technology.

entities.name: NATURAL CROSS-POLLINATION
entities.description: A process used in the development of hybrid pigeonpea.

entities.name: ICRISAT
entities.description: The institution where the hybrid technology for pigeonpea was evolved.

entities.name: ICPH 2740
entities.description: A high-performing hybrid variety of pigeonpea.

entities.name: TELANGANA
entities.description: The Indian state where the hybrid ICPH 2740 was released for cultivation.

entities.name: MANNEM KONDA KANDI
entities.description: The released name of the hybrid variety ICPH 2740.

entities.name: WILT RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of the hybrid ICPH 2740 to resist wilt disease.

entities.name: STERILITY MOSAIC RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of the hybrid ICPH 2740 to resist sterility mosaic disease.

entities.name: ASHA
entities.description: The ruling variety of pigeonpea used as a benchmark for comparison.

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The productivity measure of pigeonpea, which was increased by the hybrid ICPH 2740.

entities.name: SEED TECHNOLOGY
entities.description: The technology related to the production and distribution of the hybrid ICPH 2740.
